changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: DETERIORATING (Day 18 09:00): ZERO de-escalation channels. Araghchi explicitly denies ceasefire. War enters third week. Oil shock deepening. 10K homes destroyed Tehran. Global score 91 STABLE.

latest_news.headline: Iran FM Araghchi: "We never asked for a ceasefire" — contradicts Trump claims
latest_news.text: Iran Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi explicitly denies Tehran requested ceasefire, directly contradicting Trump statements that Iran "wants to make a deal."

latest_news.headline: Tehran governor: 10,000+ residential homes damaged or destroyed by strikes
latest_news.text: Tehran governor reports massive civilian infrastructure damage. 1,400+ killed since Feb 28. US claims 15,000 targets struck.

latest_news.headline: Trump threatens to delay Xi summit over Hormuz — urges China to help
latest_news.text: Trump says he may postpone planned summit with Xi Jinping unless China helps address Strait of Hormuz disruptions.

latest_news.headline: Isfahan strikes kill 15 at factory — Shiraz residential area also hit
latest_news.text: US-Israel strikes hit Isfahan factory killing 15. Residential areas in Shiraz attacked. Day 16 of conflict.

latest_news.headline: IRGC launches 50th wave of attacks on US bases in Gulf
latest_news.text: IRGC announces 50th wave of operations against US bases in UAE, Bahrain, Kuwait.

latest_news.headline: Pak-Afghan: Kandahar strikes, border post capture claims, 118K displaced
latest_news.text: Pakistan hits Kandahar tunnels. Afghanistan claims border post capture. UNHCR: 118K displaced. Deadliest phase yet.

latest_news.headline: Israel: 4 killed in Lebanon overnight, 850+ total deaths
latest_news.text: IDF strikes Hezbollah launch sites in al-Qatrani. 4 killed overnight. 850+ total. Guterres urges diplomacy.

outlook: CRITICAL DETERIORATION — Global war probability 86% (Day 18 07:00). NO de-escalation channels active. (1) IRAN CONVENTIONAL IMMINENT 100 capped: Heavy airstrikes continue across Tehran. IRGC 50th wave. Oil crosses $100/barrel. Trump mixed: 'Iran wants ceasefire' but 'terms not acceptable.' Japan/Australia refuse Hormuz. IRGC vows to 'kill Netanyahu.' (2) ISRAEL-LEBANON IMMINENT 96: IDF strikes Beirut. Two-front war. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE IMMINENT 100 capped: France sends SAMP/T. 97 drones overnight. US talks stalled. (4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN IMMINENT 100 capped: Kandahar + South Waziristan strikes. 'Deadliest fighting yet.' (5) DPRK IMMINENT 68 RISING: 10 ballistic missiles + KN-25 nuclear test. (6) CHINA CRITICAL 34 RISING: PLA flights resume, Taiwan $40B defense. (7) RUSSIA-NATO CRITICAL 76: Finland nuclear hosting. (8) IRAN NUCLEAR CRITICAL 42 RISING: Prolonged war desperation risk. KEY: Tehran strikes intensifying as Day 18 begins. Oil shock now real at $100+. IRGC escalation rhetoric (kill Netanyahu). WHO black rain environmental warning. Modi calls Pezeshkian — India diplomatic balancing act. Iran strikes ships in Hormuz — shipping insurance spiking, corporate evacuations expanding.
